name: Technofill-Liquid-Fillers-V2.docx
content:
What are the King Technofill liquid filling machines?

The King Technofill range includes bench-top and floor-standing liquid filling machines for pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, cosmetic, food, and chemical applications. The Technofill F1 Pro (KT 1100001B) is a GMP-compliant, Industry 4.0 Ready, servo-driven semi-automatic liquid filling machine designed for high-accuracy dosing from 10ml up to 5 litres. Equipped with a precision stainless-steel gear pump and advanced electronic control, it delivers consistent, repeatable fills across a wide viscosity range. The F2 model offers dual-head capability for increased throughput.

Details

  • Technofill F1 Pro: single-head servo-driven bench-top filler with positive displacement gear pump for precise volumetric dosing
  • Technofill F2: dual-head filler for increased throughput on production lines
  • Fill range: 10ml to 5 litres (F1 Pro), suitable for low-viscosity (water-like) to high-viscosity liquids including thick oils and viscous solutions
  • Dosing accuracy: 1% or better, achieved through servo motor with closed-loop encoder feedback
  • Three-stage profile filling with suck-back functionality for precise and drip-free filling
  • Pharmaceutical-grade stainless steel chassis construction for durability, hygiene, and corrosion resistance
  • Industrial 7” PCAP touchscreen with PLC control — intuitive glass-front HMI for reliable operation and fast setup
  • Recipe-based operating system with full recipe management for rapid product changeovers
  • Multi-language interface: English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish (additional languages on request)
  • Industry 4.0 connectivity: integrated OPC UA Client/Server for SCADA, MES, ERP and factory networks; Ethernet (PoE) via shielded CAT5/CAT5e; optional Wi-Fi; optional secure HTML5 browser interface for remote diagnostics and monitoring
  • Recipe backup, firmware updates, and data export via network or USB
  • Interchangeable gear pump sizes: 1.5, 6, 10, or 17 litres per minute positive displacement pumps available
  • Optional 12.5 litre conical hopper with sanitary outlet and pump adaptor for creams, colloids, and high-viscosity materials
  • Plain nozzles available in stainless steel 316: 6mm, 8mm, 10mm, and 12mm outside diameter, 125mm length
  • Wander nozzle assemblies available in 6mm, 8mm, 10mm, and 12mm with Sanitary Tri Clover connection for mobility and flexibility
  • Pneumatic actuated dispensing nozzle option for precise start/stop control using compressed air (4 to 6 Bar required when fitted)
  • CentreJet nozzle option for focused, jet-like dispensing pattern — stainless steel 316 construction
  • Non-return valve assemblies and sanitary non-return valve options to prevent backflow
  • Inlet assemblies available: 25mm and 12.7mm bore hose connections
  • Optional foot switch for convenient hands-free operation
  • Optional hot fill pumps for products requiring elevated temperatures
  • Adjustable nozzle holder assembly accommodates different container sizes and shapes
  • Build standards: Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC, EMC Directive 2004/108/EC, FDA-compliant contact materials
  • Power requirement: 220/240V 50Hz 1 phase or 110V 60Hz 1 phase 13A
  • Net weight: 36kg (F1 Pro)
  • CE certified, designed in compliance with UKCA and CE standards
  • Manufactured within ISO 9001:2015 quality systems at C.E. King’s UK facility
  • Standard machine warranty: 1 year from delivery
  • Instruction manual (English) included with mechanical and electrical drawings, parts lists, and maintenance details
  • Customs tariff classification: 8422.30 (Machinery)
  • Country of origin: United Kingdom
  • Spare nozzles, inlet assemblies, pumps, and other parts available at king.parts

Link:

https://www.ceking.com/collections/liquid-filling-machines
